channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Long overgrown grass, 19th June
item.description:
The long overgrown grass front of the estate Cleeve Gardens at A435 and Buzzard Road, it’s dangerous for coming out from the Buzzard Road GL527AW.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface problem, 19th June
item.description:
Sunken / damaged kerb next to gully & utility cover is slightly risen in the footway.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 19th June
item.description:
